executives.name: Ryan O'Connor
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer of Global X Management Company LLC since April 2024. Previously held various leadership roles at Goldman Sachs Asset Management.

executives.name: John Belanger
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer of Global X Management Company LLC since 2020. Previously served as Head of Product at Global X.

executives.name: Alex Ashby
executives.background: Head of Product Development at Global X Management Company LLC. Responsible for the design and management of the firm's ETF suite.

board_of_directors.name: Charles Baker
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee. Formerly a partner at DLA Piper LLP (US).

board_of_directors.name: Susan Ciccarone
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee. Managing Director at Kapitus. Previously at Goldman Sachs.

board_of_directors.name: Clifford Weber
board_of_directors.background: Independent Trustee. CEO of New York Digital Assets Group. Former Executive Vice President at the American Stock Exchange.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 485BPOS - Global X Funds Post-Effective Amendment
